{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220236160CC4C0B952C040739690"}"},"total":402},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7262568721893262121","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我个人觉得  挺好看的   女主拥有两世记忆  喜欢躺平  但是心怀国家   男女主前世过的不太好但又不虐   这辈子的一切都是上辈子换来的   女主真真是团宠   男女主有实力 有智力 有家世 有背景   吃国家饭哦~   完全没有家族争斗那些糟心事     一直顺顺利利的   书不长  但是很好看   喜欢这种及时完结的书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690948650,"group_id":"7209540803725626383","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没货了就别硬水 本来好看的都变不好看了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Jejd6qUy8AJrRvpVvDg5I=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d65b04df52f54505b9b658d9a48db520~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707437&x-signature=pX63XULMb6JovV4XjqcSaTjy0fs%3D","user_id":"111169689106","user_name":"叫我社君大人🧣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111169689106","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1644765376,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7209540803725626383","book_info":{"abstract":"叶遥的灵魂是赶着投胎的时候被神之一手捏住命运的后脖颈强塞进这个弱鸡的身体里的。
半路投胎竟然是千娇万宠的大小姐。
呜呜呜，终于不用过该死的刀口舔血的生活了。
从此她就要做一个热衷摆烂的富N 代！！
都别管她，让她和床和手机谈一场不分手的恋爱！！
   “大哥，求求你了，我真的想当一个不学无术的富二代，不要给我画商业大饼！！！”好家伙，怎么商业知识就自己跑进脑子里了？？
  “二哥，好死不如赖活着，我就想为减少世界的氧气添砖加瓦，不想能文能武！！”这枪怎么不听话？？自己就射到靶心了？
  “三哥，知识是罪恶的源泉，不学习的孩子才会快乐！不要让我学习！！”怎么又考了第一名！！我发誓，是考卷先动的手！
  “四哥，我是真的不会演戏啊！！我都没学过表演！！”怎么小金人就给她了，一群眼瞎的导演。
  “五哥，这古筝和乐器我是真不行啊，这个弦是钢丝吗？我会血溅当场吧！！”艾玛，手不听使唤了！！！这首东风破怎么回事！
凶神恶煞的恶女抱着她的大腿喊大姐，高冷勿近的男神转身变成黏黏怪，时常想和她贴贴。
叶遥：哒咩，丑拒了。
各路大佬哭着让她当接班人，叶遥连夜扛着火车就跑。
叶遥：别卷了，我真的想躺平！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4b199699ffac71e8ef4d9120d8b88153~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"木稚","author_id":"","book_id":"7209540803725626383","book_name":"全体跪下，摆烂大小姐她无敌了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2680人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":468,"name":"冰山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=468&name=冰山&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7210570440400437815","read_count":"2680","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"595335"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"291","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,总裁,穿越,冰山,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ac11f6f4728a8fab9df138f26de2ea09~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302177&x-signature=8M986Vad0eEjBOHlXLXuqUKb%2Ba0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4455677604140205","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.8387715e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220236160CC4C0B952C040739690"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":48387,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":19788},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1691052073,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7246812806292603703","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的很好啊，就是我没有看很多，因为给我的感觉不是很舒服。其实那也是表达爱的一种方式吧，但是我并不能去感受到，因为我比较缺爱，我是个缺爱的孩子，我想要的爱就是对你好，然后宠你，所以抱歉啦，看那么几章就不看了，那就点个五星浅浅的做个鼓励好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687280387,"group_id":"7209540803725626383","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"后来我只相信你，最后连你也骗我","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5sfteCeJ1MmgdpfI/kOEH6dgN3IdZF4Tf0FtJKQ72zU","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a2100de9e04245d99c93d94989522e63~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702797&x-signature=Vv2ZH8D2kN3oNtk7uyC%2F2CN8mdQ%3D","user_id":"2485365372880381","user_name":"如果爱无归"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2485365372880381","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1666513323,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#   “二哥，好死不如赖活着，我就想为减少世界的氧气添砖加瓦，不想能文能武！！”这枪怎么不听话？？自己就射到靶心了？

  “四哥，我是真的不会演戏啊！！我都没学过表演！！”怎么小金人就给她了，一群眼瞎的导演。
  “五哥，这古筝和乐器我是真不行啊，这个弦是钢丝吗？我会血溅当场吧！！”艾玛，手不听使唤了！！！这首东风破怎么回事！
